feed.title: Howl Street — Your Wolf of Wall Street
feed.subtitle: They howl for themselves. We howl for you. No-BS finance signals from 100+ sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] Iran allows Japanese supertanker through Strait of Hormuz, easing supply fears #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Iran's move suggests potential diplomatic openings, reducing immediate oil supply fears and impacting market predictions on crude prices. The post Iran allows Japanese supertanker through Strait of Hormuz, easing supply fears appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Fitch switches outlook on Landbank, DBP to ‘negative’ #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Fitch Ratings has revised the outlooks on the country’s two state-owned lenders to “negative,” following a similar sovereign credit outlook downgrade last week. This signaled pressure on the government’s ability and willingness to support the banks. In a commentary on Tuesday, the London-based debt watchdog said the government support ratings (GSR) of

entry.title: PSEi extends slump to fifth day on war, inflation concerns #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, PHILIPPINES — The Philippine Stock Exchange Index (PSEi) fell on Tuesday, extending losses to a fifth straight session. Investors stayed cautious over geopolitical tensions and rising inflation risks. The benchmark index slipped 0.58 percent or 34.36 points to close at 5,866.79. READ: Oil rises, stock markets mixed as US-Iran peace talk hopes dim Philstocks

entry.title: Peso sets new record low, closed at 61.30:$1 #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippine peso finished past the 61-per-dollar level on Tuesday, marking a new record low. This, as the US dollar continues its bullish run amid uncertainties over the Middle East conflict. READ: US dollar still dominates forex markets The local currency weakened by 59 centavos to close at 61.30 against the greenback,

entry.title: JPMorgan's Dimon sees private credit slump as likely, but it's not systemic #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: JPMorgan's Dimon sees private credit slump as likely, but it's not systemic

entry.title: Alphabet’s $175B-$185B AI capex plan doubles prior levels amid antitrust scrutiny #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Alphabet's increased AI investment may boost long-term growth but risks near-term margin pressure amid regulatory challenges. The post Alphabet’s $175B-$185B AI capex plan doubles prior levels amid antitrust scrutiny appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Cognizant's Innovation Network a Fast Track to Enterprise Value #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Investment arm deepens firm's AI builder strategy by creating a direct pipeline from startup innovation to enterprise-scale implementation TEANECK, N.J., April 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Cognizant (Nasdaq: CTSH) today announced the launch of the Cognizant Innovation Network, a corporate...

entry.title: Microsoft says legacy banks are hitting a breaking point as AI takes over the heavy lifting #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Microsoft says legacy banks are hitting a breaking point as AI takes over the heavy lifting

entry.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average futures wobble as Iran talks stall, Crude Oil jumps #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average saw marginal gains on Tuesday's session, with futures holding near 49,200 and the underlying cash index adding roughly 0.1%, propped up by a 5% jump in Coca-Cola (KO) after a stronger-than-expected earnings print.

entry.title: Li Bang International Announces Regaining Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: JIANGYIN, China, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Li Bang International Corporation Inc. ("Li Bang International") and its subsidiaries (collectively, the "Company," "we," "us," "our company," or "Li Bang") (Nasdaq: LBGJ), a company engaged in designing, developing, producing, and selling stainless steel commercial kitchen equipment in China, today announced that on April 28, 2026, the Company received a formal notification letter from the Nasdaq Listing Qualifications Department confirming that the Company has regained compliance with the minimum bid price requirement for continued listing on The Nasdaq Stock Market.

entry.title: More Than a Discount: Drivers Who Bundle Home and Auto See Fewer Coverage Gaps and Smoother Claims #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Industry data shows bundled policyholders can save up to 25 percent on premiums while benefiting from simplified claims handling and more consistent protection LOS ANGELES, April 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- As insurance costs remain top of mind for consumers, new insights from Mercury...

entry.title: SMCX Could Go Parabolic Again if the AI Server Boom Still Has Another Leg #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The math of a 2x daily reset leveraged ETF is unforgiving in a way that takes most investors a few painful months to fully appreciate. Defiance Daily Target 2X Long SMCI ETF (NASDAQ:SMCX) trades around $12 today after falling 8% in a single session, a reminder that this thing can move violently in either direction. ... SMCX Could Go Parabolic Again if the AI Server Boom Still Has Another Leg

entry.title: Zealand says GLP-1 developed with Boehringer led to 17% weight loss in late-stage trial #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Zealand says GLP-1 developed with Boehringer led to 17% weight loss in late-stage trial

entry.title: Your $2 Million Nest Egg Loses 5 Years of Runway When Inflation Stays Above 4% #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: A 62-year-old couple retires with $2 million saved, plans to draw $80,000 a year using the classic 4% rule, and assumes the standard retirement-calculator inflation rate of 2% to 3%. Then inflation settles in above 4% and stays there. The plan that looked airtight at 60 quietly runs five years short. This is the situation ... Your $2 Million Nest Egg Loses 5 Years of Runway When Inflation Stays Above 4%

entry.title: Osceola-backed Valor Exterior Partners Announces Acquisition of Massachusetts-based Associate Roofing #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: CINCINNATI, April 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Valor Exterior Partners, a portfolio company of Osceola Capital, is pleased to announce the successful acquisition of Associate Roofing, expanding Valor's presence into southern Massachusetts and Martha's Vineyard. Established in 1975 by Michael...

entry.title: DP World Helps Displace 24% of Port Diesel With Lower Carbon Fuel at Prince Rupert #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: More than 2 million litres of conventional diesel displaced as port partners target 2.7 million litres in 2026 VANCOUVER, British Columbia, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — DP World and its partners displaced nearly 24% of conventional diesel use at the Port of Prince Rupert in 2025, shifting more than 2 million litres to renewable […]
